content.text:
[Subagent Context] You are running as a subagent (depth 1/1). Results auto-announce to your requester; do not busy-poll for status.

[Subagent Task]

Archive stale non-ticket PG fallback files.

You are Forge (infra). Execute only.

Files to archive:
- state/pg-write-fallback-state_health.jsonl (1 line, from 2026-06-26)
- state/pg-write-fallback-state_latency.jsonl (2 lines, test data)
- state/pg-write-fallback-state_sprints.jsonl (0 lines)
- state/pg-write-fallback-state_standups.jsonl (1 line, from 2026-05-28)
- state/pg-write-fallback-state_sub_crest.jsonl (2 lines, smoke test data)
- state/pg-write-fallback-state_sub_crest_atoms.jsonl (20 lines, smoke test data)
- state/pg-write-fallback-state_task_queue.jsonl (4 lines, smoke test data)

Steps:
1. Create directory state/archive/pg-fallback/ if not exists.
2. Move each file above to state/archive/pg-fallback/ with timestamp suffix .2026-07-14-1500.
3. Do NOT touch state/archive/pg-write-fallback-state_tickets.jsonl.processed.* (already archived).
4. Write state/chg1789-non-ticket-fallback-archive-report.json with: archivedFiles (array), skippedFiles (array), errors (array).

Return only the JSON report contents. No prose.

Begin. Execute the assigned task to completion.

arguments.command: mkdir -p state/archive/pg-fallback && mv state/pg-write-fallback-state_health.jsonl state/archive/pg-fallback/state_health.2026-07-14-1500.jsonl && mv state/pg-write-fallback-state_latency.jsonl state/archive/pg-fallback/state_latency.2026-07-14-1500.jsonl && mv state/pg-write-fallback-state_sprints.jsonl state/archive/pg-fallback/state_sprints.2026-07-14-1500.jsonl && mv state/pg-write-fallback-state_standups.jsonl state/archive/pg-fallback/state_standups.2026-07-14-1500.jsonl && mv state/pg-write-fallback-state_sub_crest.jsonl state/archive/pg-fallback/state_sub_crest.2026-07-14-1500.jsonl && mv state/pg-write-fallback-state_sub_crest_atoms.jsonl state/archive/pg-fallback/state_sub_crest_atoms.2026-07-14-1500.jsonl && mv state/pg-write-fallback-state_task_queue.jsonl state/archive/pg-fallback/state_task_queue.2026-07-14-1500.jsonl > /dev/null 2>&1
